# Buildrex Site — Copilot Agent Instructions

> **Role:** Principal Next.js Architect & SEO Strategist  
> **Project:** Buildrex Construction — Social Housing & Property Refurbishments (Ireland)  
> **Stack:** Next.js (Pages Router) · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · pnpm  
> **Live site:** https://www.buildrex.ie

---

## AGENT DIRECTIVE

When making significant changes to this codebase (new pages, structural refactors, SEO changes, schema updates, sitemap changes), **update this file** under the [Changelog](#changelog) section before ending your turn.

---

## 1. Brand Identity

| Token | Value |
|---|---|
| Primary Dark | `#1A2F23` (Forest Deep) |
| Neutral Light | `#F4F1EA` (Warm Stone) |
| Accent | `#FF5722` (Safety Orange) |
| Headline Font | Space Grotesk |
| Body Font | Inter |

---

## 2. Project Structure

```
buildrex_site/
  common/
    constants.ts          # Shared constants
    seoConfig.ts          # All SEO schema generators + siteMetadata
  components/
    Layout.tsx            # Global layout: navbar, footer, SeoHead wrapper
    SeoHead.tsx           # Renders <head> meta + JSON-LD @graph on every page
    SeoHead props: title, description, url, canonical, image, type, structuredData, noindex
    about/
    commercialResidential/
    contact/
    emergencyHouse/
    homePage/
    projects/
    socialHouse/
    socialHouseRL/
  pages/
    index.tsx             # Home
    about.tsx
    contact.tsx
    projects.tsx
    socialHousing.tsx
    socialHousingRL.tsx
    commercialResidential.tsx
    emergencyHousing.tsx
    thankYou.tsx          # noindex: true — do NOT add to sitemap
    api/contact.ts        # Contact form API handler
  public/
    sitemap.xml           # Sitemap index
    sitemap-0.xml         # URL entries (keep in sync with next-sitemap.config.js)
    robots.txt
  next-sitemap.config.js  # Sitemap generation config
```

---

## 3. SEO Architecture

### seoConfig.ts — Schema generators

All structured data lives in `common/seoConfig.ts`. Every generator returns a `StructuredNode` and is included in the `@graph` output by `SeoHead.tsx`.

| Generator | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `generateOrganizationSchema()` | `Organization` | Company info, contact, sameAs |
| `generateWebsiteSchema()` | `WebSite` | Site-level, references Organization |
| `generateSiteNavigationSchema()` | `ItemList` of `SiteNavigationElement` | **Critical for Google sitelinks** — lists all 6 main nav pages with name + description |
| `generateServiceSchemas()` | `Service[]` | 3 service nodes |
| `createWebPageSchema(opts)` | `WebPage` | Per-page schema, passed via `structuredData` prop |

### SeoHead.tsx — @graph composition

Every page emits a full `@graph` containing: Organization → WebSite → SiteNavigationElement ItemList → Services → WebPage (page-specific).

### Per-page SEO pattern

```tsx
<Layout
  title="Page Name | Buildrex Construction"   // brand-first for home: "Buildrex Construction: Home"
  description="..."
  image="/images/..."
  structuredData={createWebPageSchema({ path: "/route", name: "...", description: "...", image: "..." })}
>
```

### Title format rule

- **Home page**: `"Buildrex Construction: Home"` (brand first — matches Google sitelink display)
- **All other pages**: `"Page Name | Buildrex Construction"`

---

## 4. Sitemap Rules

- Generated by `next-sitemap.config.js` via `pnpm postbuild`
- `/thankYou` is **excluded** (noindex page)
- Priority tiers: home = `1.0`, main pages = `0.8`, secondary = `0.6`
- After adding/removing pages: update `next-sitemap.config.js` **and** `public/sitemap-0.xml`

---

## 5. Search Engine Verification Tags

| Engine | Location | Tag |
|---|---|---|
| Bing / Microsoft | `pages/_document.tsx` `<Head>` | `<meta name="msvalidate.01" content="0FFD2ADA9A1CAD52E3849D6744EF8765" />` |

Verification tags belong in `_document.tsx` (global, server-rendered head) — **not** in `SeoHead.tsx` (which is Next.js `<Head>` and page-level).

---

## 6. Contact API

- `pages/api/contact.ts` — Next.js API route (local, used in dev/Netlify)
- `buildrex-contact-api/` — Standalone Vercel deployment at `https://github.com/kar1timmins/buildrex_contact_api`
- reCAPTCHA v3 is used on all form submissions and navigation events
- Environment variables: `RECAPTCHA_SECRET_KEY`, `EMAIL_USER`, `EMAIL_PASS`, `SMTP_HOST`, `SMTP_PORT`

---

## 7. Development Commands

```bash
pnpm dev          # Start dev server
pnpm build        # Build + auto-generates sitemap (postbuild)
pnpm start        # Serve production build
pnpm lint         # ESLint
```

---

## 8. Adding a New Page — Checklist

1. Create `pages/<name>.tsx` using the Layout + `createWebPageSchema` pattern
2. Add `SiteNavigationElement` entry in `generateSiteNavigationSchema()` in `common/seoConfig.ts`
3. Add URL entry to `public/sitemap-0.xml` with appropriate priority
4. Add path to `next-sitemap.config.js` `transform` priorities map
5. If page should be `noindex`, add to `exclude` array in `next-sitemap.config.js`
6. Add to `lightBackgroundPages` array in `Layout.tsx` if it has a white/light background
7. Update this file under [Changelog](#changelog)

---

## Changelog

### 2026-03-22

#### SEO — Sitelinks & Search Presence Improvements
**Goal:** Match the rich sitelink display Foundrex shows on Google (sub-page links shown under the main result).

**Files changed:**
- `common/seoConfig.ts` — Added `generateSiteNavigationSchema()` exporting an `ItemList` of `SiteNavigationElement` nodes for: About, Contact, Social Housing, Commercial To Residential, Emergency Housing, Projects.
- `components/SeoHead.tsx` — Added `generateSiteNavigationSchema()` to the `@graph` array so every page emits the navigation schema.
- `pages/index.tsx` — Changed title from `"Home | Buildrex Construction"` → `"Buildrex Construction: Home"` (brand-first, matches Google sitelink display pattern).
- `next-sitemap.config.js` — Added `exclude: ['/thankYou']`, set priority tiers (home `1.0`, main `0.8`, secondary `0.6`), changed main pages from `daily` → `weekly`.
- `public/sitemap-0.xml` — Removed `/thankYou` entry, updated priorities to match config.

#### Bing Webmaster Tools Verification
- `pages/_document.tsx` — Added `<meta name="msvalidate.01" content="0FFD2ADA9A1CAD52E3849D6744EF8765" />` to global `<Head>` for Bing site ownership verification.
